metadata.description: Violet's curated collection of productivity and development plugins

plugins.name: violet-skilltag-automation
plugins.description: Intelligent skill activation system with bilingual support and SAB priority

plugins.name: font-inspector
plugins.description: Font analysis MCP server with glyph comparison, coverage analysis, and hooks

plugins.name: violet-core
plugins.description: Violet's unified context engine — smart soul loading + MCP server + Rust cipher v4 multi-layer encryption.

plugins.name: lavender-memorysys
plugins.description: Token-efficient encrypted memory system — SQLite + FTS5 with multi-provider embeddings and zero-inject session loading

plugins.name: lylacore-js
plugins.description: Lylacore JavaScript SDK — foundational identity architecture for AI agents with Mind Schema, COACH Protocol, and Soul Package Format

plugins.name: lylacore-native
plugins.description: Lylacore Rust-native core — high-performance cryptographic primitives and COACH engine with Node.js/Python bindings (2-5x faster than JS)
